reasoning_chain_text: 1. Determine how Alessandro Scarlatti and Pyotr Ilyich Tchaikovsky are described as composers.
2. Return which named composer is described as the first Russian composer to make a lasting international impression.
original_final_question: Who was the first Russian composer to make a lasting impression internationally, Alessandro Scarlatti or Pyotr Ilyich Tchaikovsky? Write your answer as [ANSWER].
original_reasoning_chain: Node 1 and Node 2: Alessandro Scarlatti is described as an Italian Baroque composer, while Pyotr Ilyich Tchaikovsky is described as the first Russian composer whose music made a lasting impression internationally, so the answer is Pyotr Ilyich Tchaikovsky. -> Pyotr Ilyich Tchaikovsky
